session.assistant: Good. Now let me do a comprehensive scan to ensure nothing was missed:
session.tool_result: CHANGELOG.md:457:- Fix `erk br co --for-plan` stacking plan branches on current branch instead of trunk CHANGELOG.md:466:- Fix `erk br co --for-plan` output to include activation instructions CHANGELOG.md:514:**Key features:** `ERK_PLAN_BACKEND` environment variable, draft PR auto-publishing during `erk pr submit`, backend-agnostic plan checkout via `erk br co --for-plan`. CHANGELOG.md:536:**How it works:** `erk br create` in assigned worktree slots now updates the assignment tip in place, enabling stacked branches to share a single worktree. Plan checkout unified under `erk br co --for-plan` with `--new-slot` option. CHANGELOG.md:538:**Key features:** `erk br co --for-plan`, `--new-slot` flag, `erk wt create-from` for adopting existing branches. `erk prepare` removed. CHANGELOG.md:557:- Stack-in-place branch creation and `prepare` command removal: `erk br create` in assigned worktree slots now updates the assignment tip in place, enabling stacked branches to share a single worktree. `erk prepare` removed; use `erk br create --for-plan` instead CHANGELOG.md:591:- Unify plan checkout with `erk br co --for-plan` and `--new-slot`, replacing `erk br create --for-plan` CHANGELOG.md:622:- Remove `erk prepare` command — use `erk br create --for-plan` instead CHANGELOG.md:623:- Remove `erk:prepare` command; use `erk br co --for-plan` instead CHANGELOG.md:888:- Add `erk prepare` command as shorthand for `erk br create --for-plan PLAN` CHANGELOG.md:890:- Add `--for-plan` option to `erk br create` for creating branches directly from GitHub issues docs/learned/cli/checkout-three-path-logic.md:6: - "working with --for-plan flag" docs-site-archived/tutorials/first-plan.md:115:erk br co --for-plan 1 docs-site-archived/tutorials/first-plan.md:210:| Prepare worktree | `erk br co --for-plan <issue>` | .claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md:1319:| `--learn-plan` | INTEGER | No | Sentinel.UNSET | Learn PR number (required if status is completed_with_plan) |
No matches found

This seems to have been missed by the previous agent. Let me check. 4. `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` line 1319 - still has `--learn-plan`. This needs to be fixed.
